creator: bmah@acm.org
text:
If memory serves me right, David Kelly wrote:
> "Bruce A. Mah" writes:
> > I think this PR can be closed...the listed problem doesn't appear
> > to be present in the version of exmh2 I'm running (2.2-pre-release).
> > 
> > (A lot of things have changed since exmh-2.0.2.)
> 
> Fine by me. I haven't seen the problem in a long time. So long that I've
> completely forgotten about this PR. Have been running 2.1.1 with
> nmh-1.0.3. exmh-2.1.2 is out but not in ports last I checked. Looks 
> like I'm behind one in nmh.

Hi David--

Thanks for the reply.  You definitely want to pick up nmh-1.0.4, there
was some security-related bug in prior versions whose exact nature I
can't remember but I could look up if you're interested.

exmh-2.2 is current now.  I volunteered to update the Ports Collection
entry for it, but unfortunately that's before I realized what exmh's
install process was like (I don't run exmh out of Ports because I keep a
copy checked out of the exmh CVS repository).  Might be another day or
two before I get a PR submitted.

Bruce.
